divergences.description: Agent C correctly identified missing rate limits on auth routes, while Agent B stated all public endpoints were rate-limited.
Agent A and B identified the hardcoded custom domain in modal_app.py as a blocker; Agent C missed this specific deployment-preventing issue.
Agent B was the only one to identify missing LICENSE files in sub-packages (client/shared), a critical OSS requirement.

rationale: Agent B provided the most thorough audit, catching legal (licenses), operational (internal docs), and technical (Modal domains) issues. Agent A missed the license/docs issues. Agent C missed the deployment blocker. Agent B is the clear winner for depth and breadth, despite missing the specific auth rate limit finding.
